title: Add animations to BankFinanceBanner component

requirements.text: Add entrance and interactive animations to the BankFinanceBanner component. Include: a fade-in + slide-up animation when the section scrolls into view, a pulsing or glowing effect on the '90%' loan figure to draw attention, a subtle shimmer or shine sweep animation across the banner background, and a hover animation (scale + glow) on the WhatsApp CTA button. Use CSS keyframe animations or Tailwind animation utilities — no external animation libraries.

quotes: Modify the bank finance part with some animation

acceptanceCriteria: The BankFinanceBanner section animates in (fade + slide-up) when it enters the viewport on scroll
The '90%' loan highlight text or badge has a continuous pulse or glow animation to attract attention
The banner background has a periodic shimmer or shine sweep effect
The WhatsApp CTA button scales up and glows on hover with a smooth transition
Animations do not block interactivity or cause layout shifts
All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion media query (animations are disabled or minimized for accessibility)

constraints: Do not change the BankFinanceBanner content, copy, or WhatsApp link (wa.me/917838867880)
Do not use external animation libraries (e.g., Framer Motion, GSAP) — use Tailwind CSS utilities or native CSS keyframes only
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths
nonGoals: Modifying any other sections or components beyond BankFinanceBanner
Changing the backend or data layer
